chapter_title.en: The Reward of the Night Prayer

text: 1370 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ كَثُرَ صَلاَتُهُ بِاللَّيْلِ حَسُنَ وَجْهُهُ بِالنَّهَارِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1370 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "Whoever increases their prayers during the night will have a radiant face during the day."
